description: I, as white, actually got away with the capture. The simplest answer is the correct one. My first problem, hopefully someone will benefit from it. Thanks so much to the people who caught my stupid mistakes right after I posted the problem...I had to make the problem simpler, but maybe that's better for editing anyway.
sgf:

(;B[de]C[];W[ad]C[That's right...but now white is about to take. How do you fortify?]
(;B[ce]C[Exactly--connect! A very easy problem...simplicity is best, right? ^_^RIGHT])
